notes: Requested CME_MINI:ES1! resolved to CME_MINI_DL:ES1! (delayed-data feed variant; account has no real-time futures license). Chart 1-minute history is hard-capped at ~300-301 bars regardless of scroll/visible-range requests (chart_scroll_to_date and chart_get_visible_range tools errored; chart_set_visible_range silently clamped the requested 2025-2026 range back to the same ~300-bar window). The entire available window (2026-07-17T03:27-08:27Z) falls outside the RTH session (13:30-20:00Z / 0930-1600 America/New_York), so inSession was false for every bar and no OR/signal evaluation could occur. This is a hard data-availability blocker, not a strategy-quality result — n=0 is far below the n>=100 threshold, so insufficient_data rather than fail.
